annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under MCL 600.6013 — 4.725%, compounded annually. This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Michigan’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-01; verify at legislature.mi.gov. Not legal advice.
